Hey Product Hunt!

I'm Andrew, co-founder of Trovio. Last time we were here, we launched Pitch Kit to help creators land brand deals without an agent. Today we're launching the other side of the marketplace: the Trovio Brand Dashboard. [...] Andrew Lukas

@hazy0 Really appreciate this one, and you clearly get the thesis. Honest answer on the platform question: today the matching is built on creators who connect their accounts directly, with Instagram and TikTok first-class and YouTube rolling out now. Discord and Telegram native communities aren't in the graph yet, but our whole approach is meeting creators where they are, so any platform where real communities live is on our radar. Web3 is honestly a great example of trust living in closed spaces rather than public feeds. [...] Report

Andrew Lukas

Trovio For Brands

Trovio For Brands

Maker

@wesc Thank you! This is an awesome question.  
  
The matching itself already runs at the community level, and when you tell us about your brand we usually surface several distinct communities, because almost no brand maps to just one buyer group. So multi-segment discovery is native to how it works. For briefs, my honest take today is that one clear buyer group per brief performs better. Terms, creative direction, and what a good deliverable looks like usually differ by segment anyway, so a few focused briefs beat one broad one that averages across audiences. But letting brands define named community profiles and track them side by side inside one campaign is a really good idea. Noting it for the roadmap.

Report

results.title: Trovio - A Digital Agent for Creators
results.content:
Trovio hero illustration

# ADigital Talent Agent for Creators

Trovio is the agent for every creator, whether you're at 5K or 500K followers. Brand matches, pitch drafts, and a media kit brands actually open.

Get Your Digital Agent

## What You Post Matters More Than How Many Follow You.

What you post becomes a media kit. The themes become brand matches. Your voice becomes the pitch.

### The media kit that doesn't need a designer.

Pick a handle, pick a color, hit generate. Trovio builds your shareable media kit from the content you already make.

### Matched to what you post, not who follows you.

20 to 30 brands, grouped by the theme they'd actually fit. Three tiers: obvious fit, related overlap, and unexpected-but-defensible.

### Pitches in your own voice, anchored to real posts. [...] Your content does the heavy lifting

Your agent reads what you post, identifies the themes you're already known for, and uses those as the foundation for everything it does — brand matches, content strategy, outreach. You don't tell us your niche. We read it.

Personalized to your creator journey

Your agent learns your style, your audience, and your trajectory. The match we surface at 8K isn't the match we surface at 80K. Everything evolves with you.

Anchored to what actually worked

Every recommendation, every pitch, every match is anchored to real posts and real signals from your audience. No vague advice. No generic template with your name dropped in.

Your voice, not a template [...] Your voice, not a template

Voice profile extracted from your own writing. No persona slider, no tone dropdown. Tune formality, energy, or humor if you want, but the baseline is already you.

Your agent is always with you

Middle of the night wondering what to post next? Sunday afternoon planning your week? Your agent lives on your phone — one tap away the moment you have a minute.

No agency cut, ever

Subscription only. We don't take a percentage of your brand deals, affiliate income, or anything else. What you make is yours.

Get Your Digital Agent

## FAQs

We know getting a digital agent might feel new. Here's everything you need to know about how Trovio works, what makes us different, and how we help creators grow.

### Getting Started

### How It Works

### Pricing & Commissions

results.title: Trovio
results.content:
# Trovio
A Digital Talent Agent for Creators
Social Networking Platforms • New York, NY • 350 followers • 2-10 employees

## Overview
For creators ready to turn their following into a business, Trovio is your digital talent agent – delivering what human agents do for top creators, but accessible to everyone. Unlike traditional representation or generic tools, Trovio works 24/7 to land you brand deals, optimize your affiliate income, and tell you what content your audience actually wants.

### Website

### LinkedIn

### Industry
Social Networking Platforms

### Company Size
2-10 employees  
6 associated members (LinkedIn members who've listed Trovio as their current workplace on their profile)

### Founded
2025 [...] ## Similar Companies
Trovio (Environmental Services):  (N/A); Illume (Business Intelligence Platforms):  (Cincinnati, OH); Lasoh (Hospitality):  (Columbus , OH); Cintrifuse (Non-profit Organization Management):  (Cincinnati, OH); GardenIQ (Technology, Information and Internet):  (Cincinnati, OH); yoorz.ai (Technology, Information and Internet):  (N/A); PropIQ AI (Software Development):  (N/A); StartupCincy (Non-profit Organizations):  (N/A); Troveo AI (Technology, Information and Media):  (N/A); Cloverleaf (Human Resources Services):  (Cincinnati, Ohio) [...] That's a stock photo site with people in it. The entire industry is built around making creators findable by brands. Nobody is building software that makes creators fundable by themselves. Tools that help you pitch. Tools that help you negotiate. Tools that help you understand your own value before someone else assigns it to you. The 1% with agents already have this. Humans doing it manually, taking 15-20% off the top. The other 99% get a profile in someone else's database. We're building for the 99%. [Likes: 2, Comments: 1]; Trovio (2mo): The data on where the creator economy is actually going: Brand partnerships make up 70% of creator income, according to Goldman Sachs. Micro and nano creators will take 45.5% of influencer marketing spend in 2026 (eMarketer). Only 4% of creators earn
